title: Sass & Belle Pink Glass Bud Vases - Set of 3 - Glass Vases for Table Decoration, Mini Flower Vase for Home, Table Decor, Sass and Belle Decorative Design, Pink Vase
features: Beautiful Set of 3 Glass Vases – These Sass & Belle bud vases come in a pretty pink hue and three elegant shapes. Ideal as a small glass vase for displaying flower stems, faux florals, or seasonal picks.
Perfect Table Decor for Any Room – Whether you're styling a dining table, shelf, or mantle, these mini vases make wonderful table decorations or vases for flowers in modern or vintage homes.
Great Gift for Any Occasion – A thoughtful gift for birthdays, weddings, or housewarmings. These flower vases make charming gifts for those who love glass vases and home accessories.
Compact Yet Stylish Design – These small glass vases have a vintage feel while being practical and space-saving. Ideal for small vases for table decoration or shelf styling.
Sass & Belle Quality You Can Trust – Crafted with care and quality in mind, these vases add a touch of elegance and warmth to your interior. Part of our beautiful range of Sass and Belle home décor.
description: Elegant Vase Set for Stylish Home Décor Enhance your living space with this exquisite set of vases, designed to complement a variety of interior styles. Crafted with attention to detail, these vases serve as both functional containers and decorative accents.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎This set of three bud vases feature three different organic shapes.
